sprint_goal:
Sprint 1 goal: Build the multi-tenant foundation for PulseDesk.
project root - E:\forge2-pulsedesk-starter-kit\forge2-Shankar

Tasks needed:
1. Organization model + migration (id, name, slug, timestamps)
2. User model with organization_id FK, role enum (admin/agent/customer), Sanctum tokens
3. Register API: POST /api/auth/register (creates org + admin user together)
4. Login API: POST /api/auth/login (returns Bearer token)
5. Logout API: POST /api/auth/logout
6. EnsureSameTenant middleware — derives org from auth()->user()->organization_id NEVER from request
7. Pest tests: register, login, cross-tenant isolation (org A user cannot see org B data)

tasks.title: Organization & User Models with Migrations
tasks.description: Create Organization model/migration (id, name, slug, timestamps). Update User model to include organization_id FK and role enum (admin/agent/customer). Install and configure Sanctum for API tokens. Add relationships on both models.

tasks.title: Auth API Endpoints (Register, Login, Logout)
tasks.description: Build POST /api/auth/register that creates an Organization and an admin User in one transaction. Build POST /api/auth/login that validates credentials and returns a Bearer token via Sanctum. Build POST /api/auth/logout that revokes the current token. Register all three routes in routes/api.php.

tasks.title: EnsureSameTenant Middleware
tasks.description: Create middleware that resolves the tenant solely from auth()->user()->organization_id — never from request input, headers, or route params. Share the tenant org globally for query scoping. Register the middleware alias in bootstrap/app.php and apply it to protected API routes.

tasks.title: Pest Feature Tests — Auth & Cross-Tenant Isolation
tasks.description: Write Pest tests covering: (1) successful registration creates org + admin user and returns token, (2) login returns valid Bearer token, (3) logout revokes token, (4) cross-tenant isolation — a user from org A cannot read or access resources belonging to org B through the API. Use RefreshDatabase and factories.
